title: KINGLAKE Natural Jute Twine, 100m 2 Ply Brown Garden String, 1.5mm Jute Rope Plant String for DIY Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Christmas Decoration, Wedding, Floristry, Gardening & Packing
features: [Natural & Rustic Appeal] - Crafted from natural jute fiber, this jute twine is no harm to environment and safe for everyday use. Free from chemicals or unpleasant odours, it combines softness with strength for easy knotting. The earthy brown string twine adds a rustic charm, pairing beautifully with kraft paper, gift tags or glass jars for a vintage look.

[Perfect Size & Tangle-Free Design] - Measuring 1.5mm thick and 100m long, this tightly twisted 2-ply jute string resists fraying and breaking. The cardboard spool roll keeps your natural garden twine neat and organised, preventing tangles and making it simple to cut the exact length you need for wrapping, crafting or gardening.

[Gift Wrapping & Festive Touch] - Upgrade your presents with a handmade feel. This versatile twine string for crafts is perfect for gift wrapping boxes, tying hang tags, or maiking bows for Christmas, rustic weddings, birthdays, Easter or Teacher’s Day. Add a warm, personalised touch with our rustic parcel string.

[DIY Crafts & Creative Projects] - Whether for scrapbooking, card-making, or decorating mason jars, vases, bouquets and party favours, this craft string is a must-have for DIY enthusiasts. Flexible yet sturdy, this hessian string keeps projects secure while giving them a natural, authentic style.

[Gardening & Everyday Use] - This strong gardening twine is ideal for supporting tomatoes, cucumbers or delicate flowers in the garden, greenhouses or allotments. Blending naturally with greenery, this twine for plants offers a reliable alternative to plastic ties. Beyond gardening, use this brown twine string for bundling, storage, photo displays or festive home décor like Christmas trees.
